offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, high-risk suppliers cause financial instability. We provide vendor risk monitoring instead of manual supplier evaluation processes.
problem: High-risk suppliers can lead to financial instability and compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Join community forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try Supplier risk scoring and Compliance alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
